steps.title: Scan all three metrics to find tribal activity's standout strength
steps.content: Compare tribal economic activity across the three measures: total contribution is \$7.3 billion (second, behind professional services); employment is 51,674 (third); average contribution per employee is \$141,510. The distinctive feature is the per-employee average.

steps.title: Match the standout metric to the correct choice
steps.content:
Choice D claims tribal made the highest average contribution per employee. This matches the data exactly: $141,510 beats professional services' $110,157 and construction's \$87,994. The other choices fail because A requires tribal to rank highest in all three measures (it doesn't — professional services exceeds it in total contribution), B requires equal employment numbers (51,674 versus 77,247 contradicts this), and C claims lowest total contribution (construction's \$6.8 billion is actually the lowest).

That matches choice D — D is correct.
